LanguageData.VFED_CallShuttle.description: Call a one-way Brotherhood expeditionary vertibird for your own use, which will transport colonists, items, and animals up to 70 tiles away.
LanguageData.VFED_DelayResponse.description: Trade intel to convince the Brotherhood network to create a distraction, increasing the response time on all currently ongoing operations where the counter is already ticking down. This delays the response by 1 minute. Can be used several times.
LanguageData.VFED_IncreaseGoodwill.description: Trade intel to convince the Brotherhood network to increase your goodwill with a random faction by 5.
LanguageData.VFED_LowerVisibility.description: Use intel to convince the Brotherhood network to clear your name and reduce your visibility by 1.
LanguageData.VFED_TauntImperials.description: Spend intel to taunt a Whitespring strike force into attacking your colony.
LanguageData.VFED_LowerVisibility.label: lower visibility
LanguageData.VFED_CallShuttle.label: call shuttle
LanguageData.VFED_IncreaseGoodwill.label: increase goodwill
LanguageData.VFED_DelayResponse.label: delay response
LanguageData.VFED_TauntImperials.label: taunt Whitespring forces
LanguageData.VFED_ChangeCritical.label: change critical intel
LanguageData.VFED_ChangeCritical.description: Trade critical intel for 10 standard intel.
